global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with food icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery with a discount offer.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and attention-grabbing base.

elements.label: Food icons
elements.description: Three stylized food icons are displayed in a row, representing various meal options, with a simple and modern design.

elements.label: Food icons
elements.description: Another food icon, similar in style to the previous ones, is positioned to the right, enhancing the meal theme.

elements.label: Food icons
elements.description: A third food icon, consistent in design with the others, is placed in the center, contributing to the overall meal representation.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is located below the food icons, adding a decorative element to the design.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text reads 'Hungry? We got you Free delivery over $15 -30% Install now', prominently displayed at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Free delivery over $15 -30% Install now

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: The logo 'SnapMeal' is presented in a clean, modern font at the top left, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' is positioned at the top right, drawing attention to the promotional offer.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, food icons are centered, and the promotional text is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Hungry? We got you, Free delivery over $15, -30%, Install now, SnapMeal, SALE
